reviews.name: Chad Brocato
reviews.title: Retired Fire Chief & Public Speaker
reviews.quote: We had a difficult jumbo loan scenario that most mortgage lenders were unable to close. Not only did Jim Blackburn's mortgage team close our refinance, but now we are able to pursue the purchase of our dream home in the Florida Keys.
reviews.tag: Jumbo loan, closed where others wouldn't

reviews.name: Ashwin Pandith
reviews.title: Director, Agency MBS Portfolio Manager, Bank of America
reviews.quote: Had a great experience working with Jim and team on a refi. Was able to do virtually everything by email and text. When an issue arose, Jim made sure it got escalated and handled properly.

reviews.name: Syed Saqib
reviews.title: Chief Investment Officer, Zstep Capital
reviews.quote: This is the second loan I am doing with Jim and once again he and his team have exceeded my expectations. This time it was a multi-family unit. I can attest he provides the best possible service and gets the job done.

reviews.name: Peter & Maria Brin
reviews.title: Senior Software Developer, Sun Life Financial
reviews.quote: We were blessed to buy a wonderful home because Jim and his team "made it happen" — in record timing! But for Jim, I would have missed an opportunity to lower my rate by a full 1%. He reached out, provided the numbers and options, and guided us expertly.

reviews.name: Abhii Sundaram
reviews.title: Senior Software Engineer, Woven by Toyota
reviews.quote: Most lenders do not take the time to sit down and chat over the phone for hours like Jim does. After I applied for pre-qualification, he called and walked me through the entire process. As a first-time buyer, you get confidence knowing your lender is always accessible.

reviews.name: Michael Copenhafer
reviews.title: President & CEO, Rock Creek Software
reviews.quote: Can't say enough good things about Jim and Olga. They are a powerhouse couple: smart, organized, and TENACIOUS. His team contacted me about the amazing rates available. Every expectation I had was exceeded.

reviews.name: Dennis Nikolaev
reviews.title: RE Investor, Studio Leader
reviews.quote: I'm an RE investor. Had multiple loan officers but one really stands out — JIM BLACKBURN. I have tons of properties and live in China with unique income (he made it work!). He called me in China at 1 AM to get information to close the deal.

reviews.name: Elizabeth Torres
reviews.title: Senior Branch Manager, JP Morgan Chase
reviews.quote: We closed our loan within 19 days. Just in time for Thanksgiving! We initially had gone with a different loan office and the rate and down payment was ridiculous. Since our transaction, we've been referring Jim to anyone we know.

reviews.name: David Livermore
reviews.title: Founder, Cultural Intelligence Center
reviews.quote: Run, don't walk to work with Jim. He helped us get financing when it seemed impossible — a home purchase 2000 miles away, an extremely competitive market, and being self-employed. He went above and beyond so financing wasn't a barrier to our dream house.

reviews.name: Jim Elliott
reviews.title: Pilot, United Airlines
reviews.quote: All aspects of the loan process went well and smoothly. I would highly recommend the Jim Blackburn Team to get the best deal and save money on a loan.

reviews.name: Gary Koval
reviews.title: Regional Manager, Hyundai
reviews.quote: I have now completed five mortgages with Jim. He and his team are true professionals that you can count on. Numbers always spot on, accurate, and on time. I would never even consider looking elsewhere for any of my mortgage needs.

reviews.name: Andreea Grigorie
reviews.title: Mathematics Teacher
reviews.quote: These guys are amazing! Jim's team took a chance on me although my situation was almost hopeless. They secured a loan for me (nobody else would do it) and they closed in less than 30 days! A billion thanks to everybody on the team.

reviews.name: Brian Robertson
reviews.title: President, Circadia Group
reviews.quote: Jim worked with us to secure the best rate — not only reducing our 30 to a 15, but taking cash out for a home renovation and consolidating our first and second mortgage into one. He provided many options balancing cash-out limits with the best rates.

reviews.name: Christopher Tragasz
reviews.title: Senior Data Protection Specialist, CrowdStrike
reviews.quote: I've used Jim for multiple mortgages and REFIs. I keep going back because he's always responsive, proactive, and has a top-notch team supporting him. I've been pleased by the rates over the years, and the closing process is pretty painless.
